curation_notes: The patch commit is the merge of PR #1624 into master. The fix updated the vendored nats-io/jwt/v2 library to add nil checks in Export.Validate, Exports.Validate, Import.Validate, and Imports.Validate, and reordered issuer trust checks in server/accounts.go (checkActivation) and server/server.go (verifyAccountClaims) to run before calling Validate. Five non-test source files were modified making this a noisy patch. Locations were derived from the patch diff since the advisory description does not name specific files or functions.
